case_title: NATALIE BUENO VS. ALLRISE FINANCIAL GROUP, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BUENO, NATALIE AS TO DEFENDANT ALLRISE FINANCIAL GROUP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUENO, NATALIE AS TO DEFENDANT ALLRISE FINANCIAL GROUP, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-28-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALLRISE FINANCIAL GROUP, INC.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/17/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER - RE: ASKING COURT FOR ORDER TO DISMISS DUE TO LACK OF JURISDICTION & NO SIGNED RELEASE BY PLAINTIFF. (FILED BY DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE - YULIYA EFIMKIN); SC-105 FILED TOO LATE FOR RESPONSE BY PLAINTIFF **RECEIVED IN OFFICE 1 DAY BEFORE NOV-17-2017 HEARING**; DOCUMENTATION FORWARDED TO DEPT. 506 FOR HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLRISE FINANCIAL GROUP, INC.
SC-109: AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR NAME OF PERSON APPEARING - YULIYA EFIMKIN FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLRISE FINANCIAL GROUP, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR COURT ORDERS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT ALLRISE FINANCIAL GROUP INC IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS NOT A PROPER PARTY. PLAINTIFF NATALIE BUENO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALLRISE FINALCIAL GROUP, INC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY YULIYA EFIMKIN, COO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
